Set true to enable. Backward-compatible with MNEMOSYNE_AUTO_SLEEP_ENABLED env var."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"sleep_threshold"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"50"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Working memory count before auto-sleep triggers"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"vector_type"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"int8"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Vector storage type (note: not yet wired to BeamMemory at runtime; reserved for future use) Choices: float32"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"ignore_patterns"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"[]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Regex patterns to filter from memory storage (one per line in config, or comma-separated). Memories matching any pattern are skipped."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"profile_isolation"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"False"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Enable per-profile memory isolation via Mnemosyne banks. Each Hermes profile gets its own SQLite database under mnemosyne/data/banks/<profile>/. Default false for backward compatibility."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"shared_surface_path"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"data/shared/mnemosyne.db"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"SQLite path for shared surface memories. Default is <mnemosyne>/data/shared/mnemosyne.db."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"shared_surface_read"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"False"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"When true, mnemosyne_recall merges shared-surface results into private bank recall, tagging each result with its bank ('private' or 'surface'). Default false."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"skip_contexts"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"cron,flush,subagent,background,skill_loop"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Agent contexts where Mnemosyne should skip initialization. Comma-separated list. Defaults to 'cron,flush,subagent,background,skill_loop'. Set to empty string to enable all contexts. Also configurable via MNEMOSYNE_SKIP_CONTEXTS env var."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"sync_roles"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"['user', 'assistant']"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Conversation roles to autosave in sync_turn(). List of role names: 'user', 'assistant'. Default ['user', 'assistant'] saves both. Set to ['user'] for user turns only, or [] to disable conversation autosave entirely. Does not affect explicit mnemosyne_remember calls. Identity signal capture is gated by user sync — excluding 'user' also disables identity extraction. Also configurable via MNEMOSYNE_SYNC_ROLES env var."}]]}]]}]]}],"\n","$L3","\n","$L4","\n","\n","$L5","\n"],["$L6"],"$L7"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"3JiBHC7SpGPtZaaFYkqkO"}
3:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Environment Variables"}]
4:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne is configured entirely through environment variables. No config files, no YAML, no JSON."}]
5:["$","p",null,{"children":["| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_DATA_DIR"}]," | ~/.hermes/mnemosyne/data | Directory for database, logs, models, and stats |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_HOME"}]," | ~/.hermes/mnemosyne | Override home directory for all Mnemosyne data |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SHARED_DB_PATH"}]," | data/shared/mnemosyne.db | SQLite path for shared surface memory DB |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_BLOB_DIR"}]," |  | Directory for blob storage (content sanitizer output) |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_AUTO_MIGRATE"}]," | 1 | Auto-migrate DB schema on startup (set to 0 to disable) |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_WM_MAX_ITEMS"}]," | 10000 | Maximum items in working memory before eviction |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_WM_TTL_HOURS"}]," | 24 | Hours before working memory entries expire |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_EP_LIMIT"}]," | 50000 | Max episodic memories returned per recall |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SP_MAX"}]," | 1000 | Maximum scratchpad entries |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_RECENCY_HALFLIFE"}]," | 168 | Recency decay halflife in hours (default: 1 week) |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TEMPORAL_HALFLIFE_HOURS"}]," | 24 | Temporal voice halflife for time-weighted recall scoring |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SLEEP_BATCH"}]," | 5000 | Batch size for sleep consolidation |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_AUTO_SLEEP_ENABLED"}]," | false | Enable automatic sleep consolidation (Hermes provider, default off) |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SESSION_END_TIMEOUT"}]," | 15 | Max seconds for session-end sleep (Hermes provider) |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_AUTO_SLEEP_TIMEOUT"}]," | 5 | Max seconds for auto-sleep cycle |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SHUTDOWN_DRAIN_TIMEOUT"}]," | 2 | Max seconds to drain LLM queue on shutdown |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SLEEP_PROMPT"}]," |  | Custom prompt for sleep LLM consolidation |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TIER2_DAYS"}]," | 30 | Days before memories enter Tier 2 (compressed) |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TIER3_DAYS"}]," | 180 | Days before memories enter Tier 3 (summary only) |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TIER1_WEIGHT"}]," | 1.0 | Scoring weight for Tier 1 (fresh) memories |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TIER2_WEIGHT"}]," | 0.5 | Scoring weight for Tier 2 (compressed) memories |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TIER3_WEIGHT"}]," | 0.25 | Scoring weight for Tier 3 (summary) memories |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_DEGRADE_BATCH"}]," | 100 | Batch size for tiered degradation pass |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SMART_COMPRESS"}]," | true | Use LLM for smart tiered compression instead of truncation |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TIER3_MAX_CHARS"}]," | 300 | Max character length for Tier 3 summaries |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_STATED_WEIGHT"}]," | 1.0 | Veracity weight for stated (user-asserted) memories |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_INFERRED_WEIGHT"}]," | 0.7 | Veracity weight for inferred (LLM-extracted) memories |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TOOL_WEIGHT"}]," | 0.5 | Veracity weight for tool-returned memories |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_IMPORTED_WEIGHT"}]," | 0.6 | Veracity weight for externally imported memories |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_UNKNOWN_WEIGHT"}]," | 0.8 | Veracity weight for memories with unknown source |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_VEC_TYPE"}]," | int8 | Vector storage format (int8, float32, float16, binary) |\n| ","$L8"," | BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5 | fastembed model for vector embeddings |\n| ","$L9"," | 384 | Override embedding vector dimension |\n| ","$La"," |  | API key for cloud embedding provider |\n| ","$Lb"," | ","$Lc"," | API endpoint for cloud embeddings |\n| ","$Ld"," | false | Disable dense vector retrieval entirely |\n| ","$Le"," | false | Force cloud API mode for embeddings |\n| ","$Lf"," |  | Local fastembed model for API fallback (v3.7.0) |\n| ","$L10"," | 0.5 | Vector similarity weight in hybrid ranking |\n| ","$L11"," | 0.3 | Full-text search weight in hybrid ranking |\n| ","$L12"," | 0.2 | Importance score weight in hybrid ranking |\n| ","$L13"," | true | Enable LLM summarization during sleep consolidation |\n| ","$L14"," |  | OpenAI-compatible API base URL for remote LLM |\n| ","$L15"," |  | API key for remote LLM endpoint |\n| ","$L16"," |  | Model identifier for remote LLM calls |\n| ","$L17"," | 2048 | Max output tokens per LLM summary |\n| ","$L18"," | 2048 | Context window size for local LLM |\n| ","$L19"," | 4 | CPU threads for local LLM inference |\n| ","$L1a"," | openbmb/MiniCPM5-1B-GGUF | HuggingFace repo for GGUF model |\n| ","$L1b"," | MiniCPM5-1B-Q4_K_M.gguf | GGUF filename for local LLM |\n| ","$L1c"," |  | Fallback API URL when primary remote LLM fails |\n| ","$L1d"," |  | API key for fallback LLM endpoint |\n| ","$L1e"," |  | Comma-separated fallback model names to try |\n| ","$L1f"," | false | Skip remote LLM and use local model directly |\n| ","$L20"," | false | Enable LLM-based conflict detection during sleep |\n| ","$L21"," |  | API base URL for conflict detection LLM |\n| ","$L22"," |  | API key for conflict detection LLM |\n| ","$L23"," |  | Model for conflict detection LLM calls |\n| ","$L24"," | false | Route consolidation through host-provided LLM adapter |\n| ","$L25"," |  | Model override for host LLM adapter |\n| ","$L26"," |  | Provider override for host LLM adapter (e.g. openai-codex) |\n| ","$L27"," | 32000 | Context window budget when using host LLM adapter |\n| ","$L28"," | google/gemini-2.5-flash | Model for entity/fact extraction via OpenRouter |\n| ","$L29"," |  | Custom prompt for entity/fact extraction |\n| ","$L2a"," | false | Enable BEAM benchmark optimizations (feature flag) |\n| ","$L2b"," | 0 | Enable enhanced recall pipeline (fact+graph+episodic fusion) |\n| ","$L2c"," | 0 | Enable fact-based recall (backward compat alias) |\n| ","$L2d"," | 0 | Enable polyphonic recall engine (multi-voice fusion) |\n| ","$L2e"," | 0 | Enable proactive cross-memory linking on insertion |\n| ","$L2f"," | 1 | A/B toggle: graph traversal bonus in recall scoring |\n| ","$L30"," | 1 | A/B toggle: fact match bonus in recall scoring |\n| ","$L31"," | 1 | A/B toggle: binary vector bonus in recall scoring |\n| ","$L32"," | false | Use substring instead of exact match for fact recall |\n| ","$L33"," | 1 | A/B toggle: apply veracity multiplier to recall scores |\n| ","$L34"," | 1 | A/B toggle: cross-tier deduplication in BEAM recall |\n| ","$L35"," | 1 | A/B toggle: polyphonic vector voice (Phase 3d) |\n| ","$L36"," | 1 | A/B toggle: polyphonic graph voice (Phase 3b) |\n| ","$L37"," | 1 | A/B toggle: polyphonic fact voice (Phase 3a) |\n| ","$L38"," | 1 | A/B toggle: polyphonic temporal voice (Phase 3c) |\n| ","$L39"," | false | Enable BEAM mode (polyphonic recall engine extension) |\n| ","$L3a"," | false | Use caveman/AAAK encoding fallback for consolidation |\n| ","$L3b"," | user,assistant | Conversation roles to sync into memory |\n| ","$L3c"," | cron,flush,subagent,background,skill_loop | Comma-separated context names to skip |\n| ","$L3d"," | 500 | Max chars of user content synced per turn (0=no limit) |\n| ","$L3e"," | 800 | Max chars of assistant content synced per turn (0=no limit) |\n| ","$L3f"," | 0 | Truncate prefetched content to N chars (0=no truncation) |\n| ","$L40"," | general | Prefetch profile name (general, coding, etc.) |\n| ","$L41"," |  | Bearer token for MCP server auth (required for remote deployment) |\n| ","$L42"," | default | Default MCP bank name for tool operations |\n| ","$L43"," |  | Identifier for the author/agent creating memories |\n| ","$L44"," |  | Type of author (user, assistant, system, etc.) |\n| ","$L45"," |  | Channel/session identifier for memory scoping |\n| ","$L46"," | default | Default owner for canonical facts and shared memory |\n| ","$L47"," | 50 | Max memories per SHMR reorganization batch |\n| ","$L48"," | 3 | Max SHMR clustering iterations per batch |\n| ","$L49"," | 0.70 | Cosine similarity threshold for memory clustering |\n| ","$L4a"," | 0.60 | Harmony threshold for cluster merging |\n| ","$L4b"," |  | LLM model for SHMR summarization (empty = use default) |\n| ","$L4c"," | 2 | Minimum memories to form a SHMR cluster |\n| ","$L4d"," | 0.2 | LLM temperature for SHMR summarization |"]}]
